name: Secret Lives of the Super Rich
original_name: Secret Lives of the Super Rich
overview: It's an exclusive world filled with enormous fortunes, unimaginable extravagance and a cast of #SuperRich characters with one thing in common -- a voracious appetite for success, status, and the best of the best. CNBC unlocks the mansion gates and scores you the ultimate VIP access to a world inhabited by the wealthiest people on the planet.

trailers.title: Secret Lives Of The Super Rich Preview | Secret Lives Super Rich
